title: AdvancedBetterTeam
description: AdvancedTeam adds teams and organized PvP wars to your server. Players can create teams, fight together, and receive automatic war announcements with battle stats and team features. Perfect for SMP and PvP servers.
body:
BetterTeam
BetterTeam is a Minecraft server plugin designed to add a simple and flexible team system for SMP and PvP servers. It allows players to create and manage teams, participate in wars, and track their performance during battles.
The goal of this plugin is to make team gameplay easier to manage for server owners while giving players a structured way to play together in competitive environments.
Features
Team System
Players can create and manage teams
Team leaders can manage members
Private team chat support
Friendly fire control between teammates
Warzone System
Create custom warzones for team battles
Team vs team war gameplay
Commands to manage warzones and events
Statistics
Track player kills and battle statistics
View war statistics using commands
Scoreboard
Displays useful information during gameplay
Shows team or war related data in real time
Administration
Tools for server admins to manage teams and warzones
Simple commands for controlling the system
Commands
/team – team management
/warzone – manage warzones
/warstats – view player war statistics
Compatibility
Works with Paper, Spigot and Bukkit based servers.
Tested on Minecraft 1.21.
Developed by Zenith Ajinkya.
